questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '7d4ed5ca-ae49-4fd6-88c0-afaac3d0de4f' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '0a103ee4-a17d-4581-8f3c-ccf239a29d13'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '7d4ed5ca-ae49-4fd6-88c0-afaac3d0de4f'; delete from question_items where id = '7d4ed5ca-ae49-4fd6-88c0-afaac3d0de4f';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
